recommendations.description: Fix 1 rule(s) with contradictory checks (same field equals two different values - will never pass)

critical_issues.description: Rule checks same field equals two different values: 'AWS_OWNED_KMS_KEY' and 'CUSTOMER_MANAGED_KMS_KEY' (contradictory - field cannot equal both)
critical_issues.problem: Rule checks same field equals two different values: 'AWS_OWNED_KMS_KEY' and 'CUSTOMER_MANAGED_KMS_KEY' (contradictory - field cannot equal both)
critical_issues.impact: CRITICAL - Rule will never pass validation
critical_issues.recommendation: Use 'in' operator with list of valid values instead of checking equals two different values
